description: GraphQL API that exposes Fabric data (lakehouses, warehouses, SQL databases) as a typed GraphQL schema. Enables applications to query Fabric data via standard GraphQL queries and mutations.

definition_parts.description: Datasources array with sourceItemId, sourceWorkspaceId, sourceType, and objects with field mappings
GraphQL schema (generated after datasource is configured)

notes: No schema.graphql in initial definition until a datasource is configured
sourceItemId is the SQL analytics endpoint ID (not lakehouse/warehouse item ID)
Introspection (__schema) blocked by default unless tenant setting enabled
